# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

Prevent SQL injection.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

// Connect to the database
$dsn = 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=mydatabase';
$username = 'your_username';
$password = 'your_password';
$options = array(PDO::MYSQL_ATTR_INIT_COMMAND => 'SET NAMES utf8');
try {
    $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $username, $password, $options);
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    echo 'Connection failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
}

// Get the date range and filter values from $_POST
$dateRange = $_POST['date_range'];
$status = $_POST['status'];
$category = $_POST['category'];

// Construct the SQL query based on the selected filters
$sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
if (!empty($dateRange)) {
    $sql .= " AND date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
}
if (!empty($status)) {
    $sql .= " AND status IN (:status)";
}
if (!empty($category)) {
    $sql .= " AND category IN (:category)";
}
$stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);

// Bind the parameters to the prepared statement
if (!empty($dateRange)) {
    $startDate = new DateTime($_POST['start_date']);
    $endDate = new DateTime($_POST['end_date']);
    $stmt->bindValue(':start_date', $startDate->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
    $stmt->bindValue(':end_date', $endDate->format('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
}
if (!empty($status)) {
    $stmt->bindValue(':status', $status);
}
if (!empty($category)) {
    $stmt->bindValue(':category', $category);
}

// Execute the query and get the results
$stmt->execute();
$reports = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

// Display the reports in a table
echo '<table>';
echo '<tr><th>ID</th><th>Date</th><th>Status</th><th>Category</th></tr>';
foreach ($reports as $report) {
    echo '<tr>';
    echo '<td>' . $report['id'] . '</td>';
    echo '<td>' . $report['date'] . '</td>';
    echo '<td>' . $report['status'] . '</td>';
    echo '<td>' . $report['category'] . '</td>';
    echo '</tr>';
}
echo '</table>';

// Close the database connection
$pdo = null;
